---
title: sim-tools
subtitle: Contributing to python package
image: logo.png
---

Since **February 2025**, I have contributed to the package **sim-tools**, developed by **Tom Monks**. It supports DES in Python - for example, providing classes for different distributions and methods for estimating the appropriate number of replications.

GitHub: <https://github.com/sim-tools/sim-tools>

Documentation:

<iframe
  class="auto-preview"
  width="100%"
  height="800"
  src="https://sim-tools.github.io/sim-tools/"
  title="sim-tools">
</iframe>
